### Execute Your Game Plan

Manage your football clubs, camps, tournaments, and leagues on a single, integrated platform.

- Customize registration to capture the participant data you need
- Generate and edit program schedules
- Easily manage rosters and member data
- Create waitlists and set capacity limits
- Seamlessly integrate third-party apps and tools

![mainImage](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

### Simplify & Control Your Operations

Save time and money on all your back-office tasks. With built-in flexibility, LeagueApps gives you more power over the way you run your programs.

- Get instant insights with powerful dashboards and reporting
- Create customized levels of access for admins
- Get full ownership and control of your data
- Increase safety and productivity with powerful integrations

![mainImage](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

### Get Access to Championship Customer Support

You’re moving fast—so you need a support team that can keep pace. That’s why we provide responsive customer support 365 days of the year.

![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

### Dedicated Support Team

Support when you need it. Our support team will respond to your questions within 24 hours so you can get back to doing what you love.

![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

### Strategic Account Management

You’ll work with a team that’s invested in your growth and ready to help you take your organization to the next level. We’re always helping our customers find creative ways to win.

![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

### Comprehensive Training

Get all of the information and [training](https://support.leagueapps.com/hc/en-us) you need to set up and manage your organization, and answer parent requests, with our free webinars, tutorial videos, resources, and more.

![Carousel Image](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

“The people that are in charge of our account are extremely responsive if we have any questions or concerns about the back-end of the system, the registration system, or even the website. They clearly care about providing a fantastic customer service experience.”

###### Craig Thomas

###### CEO Northeast Rush

![Carousel Image](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

I'd like to say how grateful Hollywood PAL is for having access and using LeagueApps. It's made our program registrations and record keeping so much easier, while eliminating the need for paper files. We absolutely love it!”

###### Hollywood PAL

###### FundPlay Partner

### Grow Participation & Your Organization

Easily recruit, onboard, and engage participants in new programs, facilities, and locations.

- Launch a custom-branded website with LeagueApps Design Shop
- Design a quick and simple registration experience
- Easily manage family, parent, and player data
- Sell merchandise and swag during or after registration
- Connect to best-in-class marketing apps and tools

![mainImage](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

### Keep Your Current Members Engaged

Improve customer retention by providing parents, players, and coaches with an experience that’s flexible, personalized, and convenient.

- Provide an easy-to-use member portal
- Keep everyone in the know with an integrated mobile app
- Stay connected with powerful email, text messaging, and real-time chat tools
- Boost brand awareness by putting your colors and logos front-and-center
- Promote customer loyalty with discount codes, credits, and refunds

![mainImage](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

### Manage Your Field Planning with One Tool

Manage your facilities and field planning alongside your scheduling, registration, payments, communications, and reporting—all in one tool.

- Schedule, view, and manage bookings across all of your fields and spaces
- Ditch the spreadsheets and multiple tools
- Track and manage invoices in a few clicks
- Sync booked practices directly to your LeagueApps schedules
- Access extensive reporting, filtering, and communications

![mainImage](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

### Join a Community of Football Leaders and Level Up Your Leadership

We’ve built a community that provides football leaders with opportunities for professional development and networking–giving you the tools you need to play to win.

We’ve hosted countless virtual and in-person events as part of our NextUp brand, providing football leaders with the chance to learn from the industry’s best.

[Learn More About NextUp](https://nextupconference.com/)

![mainImage](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

###### Case Study

### Atlanta United Training Programs

Officially launched in 2018, Atlanta United Training Programs offers youth development programs for local players looking to receive hands-on training from Atlanta United Training Programs' coaching staff.

Find out why LeagueApps is the leading youth sports management platform for football organizations.

League Management Platform

# Build leagues that run themselves

Launch leagues in minutes with automated signup forms, smart scheduling algorithms, and team management tools that keep players engaged all season long.

[Get a Live Demo](https://sportscarnival.com/demo) [See Features](https://sportscarnival.com/leagues#features)

✓ Automated team building • ✓ Custom scheduling • ✓ Self-scoring • ✓ Built-in communication

![League Management Interface](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67716c56603531e7c465de0f/67a3aecc5db8e1f59c6637d3_All-leagues-Update.gif)

## Running leagues manually is exhausting

### Hours of manual scheduling

Building balanced schedules and fair matchups manually takes forever.

### Players quit mid-season

Poor communication and unbalanced teams kill retention.

### Constant score disputes

Manual score tracking leads to errors and arguments.

That's why we built **Sports Carnival Leagues**—automation that handles the busywork so you can focus on creating great experiences.


## How it works

Set up your league format, sport, and rules in minutes. Players register through smart forms that capture skills and availability. Our algorithms automatically build balanced teams and generate fair schedules. Once the season starts, players self-report scores and standings update in real-time—no manual tracking needed.

## Everything you need to run successful leagues

From setup to season end—automate the work, amplify the fun.


#### Easy League Building

**Point and click setup**—define sport, format, and rules in minutes. No complex configuration or technical knowledge required.

#### Smart Signup Forms

**Automatic team placement** based on skill level, availability, and preferences. Players register once—you're done.

#### Team Pages & Rosters

**Dedicated team spaces** for roster management, messaging, and scheduling. Teams stay organized and connected.

#### Player Self-Scoring

**Let players report results** instantly after games. Standings update automatically with dispute resolution built-in.

#### Custom Algorithms

**Smart scheduling** considers skill balance, venue availability, and fair play rotation. Multiple formats supported.

#### Built-in Communication

**Automated notifications** for schedule changes, game reminders, and league updates. Keep everyone in the loop.

## Smart Scheduling That Scales

### Advanced Algorithms

🎯 Round Robin

🏆 Swiss System

🔥 Elimination Brackets

🪜 Ladder Format

⚖️ Skill-Based Pairing

* * *

Perfect Schedules. Every Time.

Choose from multiple proven scheduling algorithms that handle the complex math for you. Whether you're running a casual league or a competitive tournament, we've got the right format.

- Round Robin ensures every team plays every other team
- Swiss System pairs teams with similar records each round
- Elimination brackets with automatic advancement tracking
- Ladder format for flexible, ongoing competition
- Custom constraints for venues, times, and rivalries

## Proven results

85%

Eliminate hours of work.

Players stay engaged.

Launch in minutes.

100%

Real-time updates.

VP – Pickleball Experience

Customer since 2021

"626 teams • 1,300+ matches • 12 clubs — all ran flawlessly. Sports Carnival built a full tournament platform in 12 weeks to our specs. Members and staff loved the experience."


## Connects with your tools

Stripe, Apple Pay, Google Pay, POS, CRM, waiver systems—your data flows seamlessly.

# The sports league management platform built by players and league organizers

100% FREE FOR
LEAGUE ORGANIZERS

[![](https://leaguelinq.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/09/google-play-badge-400x119-1.png)](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=app.leaguelinq.com&pcampaignid=web_share)

![leaguelinq header banner](https://leaguelinq.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/12/Group-4.png)

![Leaguelinq-Registration-Image](https://leaguelinq.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/12/Registration-Image.png)

## Key Features To Run Your Sports League and Tournaments

[Registration & Payments](https://leaguelinq.com/features/registration/)

##### [Registration & Payments](https://leaguelinq.com/features/registration/)

Streamlined registration processes for teams and individual players. Collect registration details for any type of season league or tournament with our custom rule set up.

[League Scheduling](https://leaguelinq.com/features/sports-league-schedule-generator/)

### [League Scheduling](https://leaguelinq.com/features/sports-league-schedule-generator/)

Automate scheduling with the click of a button. Make fair and customized schedules in seconds. Update scoring, move dates and more with our easy to use scheduling system.

[Tournaments](https://leaguelinq.com/features/tournament-software-manager/)

### [Tournaments](https://leaguelinq.com/features/tournament-software-manager/)

Create tournaments with pool play, round robin, single or double elimination. Automate playoff schedules and brackets.

[Roster Mgmt](https://leaguelinq.com/features/roster-management/)

### [Roster Mgmt](https://leaguelinq.com/features/roster-management/)

View, edit, move, add players and much more with our easy to use roster management system.

![automated scheduler maker](https://leaguelinq.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Scheduler-Graphic.png)

## Automated Scheduler

Create your entire season long league’s schedule in 15 seconds or less. Yes, you read that right.

Scheduling your leagues has never been easier with League LINQ’s schedule generator. All the features to customize your schedule;

- Auto assign matchups
- Double header matches
- Bye weeks
- Round robin
- Assign division start time by matchup day
- Assign divisions to specific courts
- Auto Swap Mode to Switch Matches
- Schedule Inspector
- All sports: [Soccer](https://leaguelinq.com/sports/soccer/), [Volleyball](https://leaguelinq.com/sports/volleyball/), [Pickleball](https://leaguelinq.com/sports/pickleball/), and more.

[Learn More Schedule Generator](https://leaguelinq.com/features/sports-league-schedule-generator/)

## Pricing 100% Free

For all sport league managers, clubs, organizers, and associations.

No hassle pricing. We don’t charge club managers anything. Managing an adult sports league shouldn’t be difficult or expensive. Schedule a demo with our team to see how we can save you money and make your life easier.

[Learn More About Our Pricing](https://leaguelinq.com/pricing/)

![Leaguelinq pricing image](https://leaguelinq.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/Image-1-pricing-1.png)

![Leaguelinq White Glove Image Section](https://leaguelinq.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/12/White-Glove.png)

## Hands-on "White Glove Support Onboarding"

We will create and set up your existing or new leagues on League Linq. Our onboarding program ensures a seamless and hassle-free experience when switching from an existing platform or using one for the first time. Feel free to reach out any time – you will have a dedicated support team.

How We Can Assist

- League Creation
- Scheduling

- Payment Set Up
- Build Your Website

[Learn More About Our Support](https://leaguelinq.com/features/white-glove-support/)

## Benefits of Using League LINQ

![Why Choose LL](https://leaguelinq.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/09/LL2.jpg)

##### Efficiency & Time Savings

Reduction in administrative tasks through automation, streamlined set up wizards and more. Use our sport management software to reduce the time you spend on running your league and focus your efforts on building and growing your leagues.

##### Free

League Linq is completely free for all league managers, admins, and organizers, with no subscription fees whatsoever. Enjoy full access to all features and functionalities within the app and platform without any cost – what more could you desire?

##### Data Mangement & Analytics

Centralized database for storing all participant information and league statistics. See which players participate the most, who generates more revenue and so much more.

#### Enhanced Players Experience

Improved communication channels between organizers and participants. With our Native App everyone has easy access to schedules, results, and live standings.

## Player-Friendly Mobile Interface

- Quick Schedule Access: Players can view their team's schedule at a glance, including upcoming games, times, and locations.
- Score Updates: Easily input and submit game scores right from the mobile app, ensuring real-time updates for the entire league.
- Instant Standings: View up-to-date league standings that are automatically calculated after each score submission.
- User-Friendly Design: Our clean, intuitive interface makes navigation a breeze, even for the least tech-savvy players.

![sports schedule generator](https://leaguelinq.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/Scheduling-Page-Mockups-3.png)

## Manage Your Sport Leagues with League LINQ

[![volleyball league software](https://leaguelinq.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/09/volleyball.jpg)](https://leaguelinq.com/sports/volleyball/)

## Volleyball

We take the hassle out of managing volleyball leagues and events so everyone can focus on the fun! Whether you’re organizing tournaments or signing up to play, League LINQ makes it a breeze for admins and players alike. Set up is a cinch for the organizers, while players can jump in with ease, letting everyone enjoy the game from start to finish.

[Learn More](https://leaguelinq.com/sports/volleyball/)

[![Soccer league management software](https://leaguelinq.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/09/soccer.jpg)](https://leaguelinq.com/sports/soccer/)

## Soccer

Soccer players, it’s time to cheer and celebrate! League LINQ is here to kick old tech, messy spreadsheets, and juggling multiple platforms to the curb. With everything you need in one convenient place, managing your league has never been easier or more streamlined. It’s time to focus on the game, not the admin, and enjoy the process!

[Learn More](https://leaguelinq.com/sports/soccer/)

[![pickleball league management software](https://leaguelinq.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/09/pickleball1-1.jpg)](https://leaguelinq.com/sports/pickleball/)

## Pickleball

Serve up seamless pickleball tournaments and leagues with League LINQ! Setting up your league or tournament is a breeze—get everything running in minutes! From collecting payments to managing it all in one place, we’ve got you covered. Players can even download our app to check live scores and bracket updates on the go.

[Learn More](https://leaguelinq.com/sports/pickleball/)

![sports league management software](https://leaguelinq.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/sports-league-management-software.jpg)

## Built by Rec League Players and Managers

League Linq stands as a true testament to its roots, having been meticulously crafted by passionate rec league players and dedicated managers themselves. Our unique experience and focus makes League Linq one of the easiest and comprehensive sport league managers on the market. Our creators’ firsthand experiences with the intricacies, challenges, and joys of recreational leagues have been woven into every feature and function, ensuring that League Linq isn’t just a generic tool, but a tailored solution.

Drawing from the collective wisdom of those who understand the pulse of recreational league dynamics, the platform becomes an invaluable companion for players and managers alike. From scheduling the ebbs and flow of busy lives to communication tools that mirror the camaraderie of the locker room, League Linq encapsulates the genuine spirit of the rec league community.

# SPORTS LEAGUE MANAGEMENT SOFTWARE.

## league    operations

Streamlines league-wide operations by unifying data, enhancing transparency and ensuring compliance—empowering data-driven decision-making and sustainable league growth.

![](https://www.kitmanlabs.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/LO_Schedule_1.png)

![](https://www.kitmanlabs.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/LO_Schedule_2.png)

![](https://www.kitmanlabs.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/LO_Schedule_3_DMN.png)

![](https://www.kitmanlabs.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/LO_Schedule_4_DMN.png)

![](https://www.kitmanlabs.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/Group-504.png)

### Operate with Intelligence.

**Leverage integrated tools for registration, scheduling and fixture management, match or gameday operations, discipline management, and compliance to reduce administrative burdens and enhance league-wide coordination and competition.**

**Automate workflows, strengthen governance, enable better communication, and establish a foundation for sustainable league-wide expansion and success.**

Core Capabilities

Feature Add-On

Integrated Solution

Core Capabilities

### PLAYER & STAFF REGISTRATION

Automate player and staff registration with standardized workflows, ensuring compliance, accuracy, and seamless onboarding.

### FIXTURE MANAGEMENT

Simplify scheduling with centralized calendars, automated competition rules, and built-in governance for conflict resolution.

### FIXTURE NEGOTIATION

Allows clubs to propose, negotiate, and approve fixture changes with league oversight, ensuring transparency and governance.

### DISCIPLINE MANAGEMENT

Track disciplinary actions, including suspensions, and maintain rule compliance with automated eligibility checks.

### MATCHDAY MANAGEMENT

Coordinate matchday operations end-to-end. Produce and distribute matchday notices, automate lineup submissions, enforce eligibility rules, and log match events in real time—ensuring compliance, seamless communication, and accurate reporting.

### MATCHDAY NOTICE

Organize and distribute match details, assign kits, and ensure officials, broadcasters, and teams receive structured game-day information.

### MATCHDAY LINEUP

Automate lineup submissions, enforce eligibility rules, assign formations, and provide match-critical data to officials and stakeholders.

### MATCHDAY REPORTING

Log match events, track game details, and ensure compliance with real-time reporting, historical records, and performance analysis.

### SCOUT ACCESS MANAGEMENT

Manage Scout requests, enforce access rules, and track approvals to ensure transparency and control across fixtures.

[PLAYER MOVEMENT ](https://www.kitmanlabs.com/platform/league-operations/#)

### [PLAYER MOVEMENT](https://www.kitmanlabs.com/platform/league-operations/\#)

Ensure player profiles transfer seamlessly between clubs within the league, reducing duplication and maintaining data continuity and accuracy.

Feature Add-On

### API for League Operations

Securely export fixture, scheduling and competition data from iP, creating alignment across the larger league infrastucture.


Features can be added to associated Solutions. Talk to us for additional details. \*U.S. Only.

![feature-icon](https://www.kitmanlabs.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/05/feature-icon.svg)

Integrated Solution

### When competition operations need to connect to development and welfare

Operations & Pathway Management brings governance, match operations, development, pathways, and welfare into one connected system—giving governing bodies the oversight and clarity required to raise standards and operate with confidence at scale.

**[Explore Operations & Pathway Management](https://www.kitmanlabs.com/platform/operations-pathway-management/)**

## Seen & Heard

SBJ Live

#### Integrating Data and Philosophy from Academy to First Team

Ian Buckman, Academy Manager at Brighton & Hove Albion F.C., highlights the club's integrated approach to player development, aligning the academy's philosophy with the first teams. The club effectively tracks player progress by sharing profiles and data between coaching and recruitment. Their Football Intelligence Platform ensures coaching consistency and evidence-based player development, reinforcing the club's commitment to data-driven practices.

[WATCH VIDEO](https://www.kitmanlabs.com/video/talent-development-football-market/)

ADU

#### Strategic Technology Adoption for Holistic Student-Athlete Care

Mark Coberley, Associate Athletics Director for Sports Medicine at Iowa State University, emphasizes the importance of a question-first approach when adopting new technology in athletic program development. He argues against the common mistake of purchasing technology without a clear purpose. Instead, he advocates for identifying key questions that need answers before choosing the appropriate technology.

[WATCH VIDEO](https://www.kitmanlabs.com/video/student-athlete-care/)

Sky Sports

#### Impact of Growing Fixture Schedule and Congestion on Injury - or Not

As footballers face an increasing number of fixtures across club and international competitions, concerns about rising injury levels are growing. Stephen Smith, CEO of Kitman Labs, addresses the potential impact of fixture congestion on player injuries on SkyNews, emphasizing that it's not just about the number of games but also how teams train, prepare for congestion, and manage player rotation. While some speculate that more games might increase risks, Stephen stresses the importance of data-driven analysis.

[WATCH VIDEO](https://www.kitmanlabs.com/video/skysports-interview-with-stephen-smith/)

Michigan State University

#### Unified Data Platforms, Streamline Workflows

On the Game Changer Podcast, Renee Kleszczynski from Michigan State University, discusses consolidating the efforts of performance coaches, athletic trainers, and strength coaches by integrating their data in one unified platform. This allows them to focus solely on their roles without additional tasks. This allows for the maintenance of accurate records and enables advanced capabilities and insights, which ultimately enhances their contributions and the overall performance management of athletes.

[WATCH VIDEO](https://www.kitmanlabs.com/podcast/powering-holistic-student-athlete-care-with-data-featuring-renee-from-michigan-state-josh-from-georgia/)

Sky Sports

#### Inside Tactics: The technology that helped Ipswich reach the Premier League

Sky News and Sam Blitz visited the Ipswich Town Training Grounds to interview Director of Performance Andrew Rolls and Kitman Labs Founder & CEO Stephen Smith. They discussed the club's multifaceted partnership with the high-performance technology company and its role in its successful bid for promotion to the Premier League.

[WATCH CLIP](https://www.kitmanlabs.com/platform/league-operations/#seen-heard-clip-42132)

Leaders Performance Institute

#### Why Player Pathway is critical today?

Watch part one of the Leaders Performance Institute Podcast Series, where industry leaders discuss establishing productive talent development pipelines, creating player pathways, and leveraging data and analytics to cultivate talent for the home team and the commercial market.

[WATCH VIDEO](https://www.kitmanlabs.com/video/winning-the-talent-arms-race-in-global-football/)

Leaders Performance Institute

#### Aarhus Positioning on Talent Development Processes

Watch part one of the Leaders Performance Institute Podcast Series, where industry leaders discuss establishing productive talent development pipelines, creating player pathways, and leveraging data and analytics to cultivate talent for the home team and the commercial market.

[WATCH VIDEO](https://www.kitmanlabs.com/video/winning-the-talent-arms-race-in-global-football/)

Leaders Performance Institute

#### Priorities for teams starting out

Watch part two of the Leaders Performance Institute Podcast Series, where industry leaders explore the transformative growth of women’s football, its economic impact and the need for expanded research to help inform player development, player welfare and performance.

[WATCH VIDEO](https://www.kitmanlabs.com/video/shaping-the-future-of-womens-sports-and-player-welfare/)

talkSPORT

#### Stephen Smith on Athlete Workload, Injuries, and the Future of Data in Sport

In this wide-ranging discussion on talkSPORT with Paul Hawksbee and Charlie Baker, Kitman Labs CEO and founder Steven Smith explores the complex realities of athlete health and performance. From injury prevention and player workloads to communicating insights in the language coaches understand, he explains why collaboration and smarter use of insights are essential to keep players on the field and extend careers.

[WATCH VIDEO](https://www.kitmanlabs.com/video/rethinking-athlete-health/)

![](https://www.kitmanlabs.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/05/lg-double-left.png)

![](http://www.kitmanlabs.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/05/lg-double-right.png)

NEXTVIDEO

Collaboratively, we have developed customized software that serves as the administrative backbone for MLS, MLS NEXT Pro and MLS NEXT. We are excited by the opportunity these tools present to improve the management of each MLS, MLS NEXT Pro and MLS NEXT competition while enhancing various aspects of the player development pathway.

Kitman Labs is a world-class technology company, and by teaming up with them, we are excited for the opportunity to utilize next-generation technology to power our entire MLS NEXT operation.

A key goal \[of the MLS Assist Initiative\] is digitizing the player pathway—using integrated technologies and data-driven systems to modernize scouting, optimize player development, and build a smarter, more connected talent pipeline. By aligning efforts across MLS, MLS NEXT Pro, and MLS NEXT, the Sporting Technology department and Kitman Labs are building an innovative and scalable foundation for how the game is managed.

![](https://www.kitmanlabs.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/MLS_CREST_FC_RGB_GRADIENT.svg)

#### Paul Grafer

MLS Senior Technical Director, Competition

![](https://www.kitmanlabs.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/10/MLS-Next-1.png)

#### Justin Bokmeyer

General Manager

![](https://www.kitmanlabs.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/MLS_CREST_FC_RGB_GRADIENT.svg)

# Your All-in-One Football League Management System

Discover the ultimate Football League Management System – a web app for organizing football matches, a mobile app designed for referees, and a customizable branding website to showcase your football league.

[Schedule a Demo](https://calendly.com/dawid-patko-flmsystem/flmsystem-demo) [Sign Up](https://cms.flmsystem.com/u/register?isFromLanding=true)

![Hero screen](https://www.flmsystem.com/_next/static/media/screen-mobile-en.2ca88618.webp)

Benefits

## WhydofootballleagueschoosetheFootballLeagueManagementSystem?

![](https://www.flmsystem.com/api/media/file/fi_16332633-1.svg?2025-12-11T08%3A57%3A13.554Z)

### Automation

Eliminate manual work and human errors with automated rankings, tables, and statistics. Whether you're managing a small local football team or a large-scale league, the FLM system ensures that all data is calculated accurately and instantly.

![](https://www.flmsystem.com/api/media/file/net-data-1.svg?2025-12-11T08%3A57%3A49.425Z)

### Data Migration

Transfer your league’s existing data into our system without losing any critical information. Our efficient data migration process ensures a smooth transition, saving you time and minimizing disruptions, so you can start managing your football league right away.

![](https://www.flmsystem.com/api/media/file/Deployed%20code%20history.svg?2025-12-11T08%3A57%3A50.026Z)

### Customizable solution & Quick deployment

Get started immediately with a system that is ready to use right out of the box. After a simple installation, the Football League Management System is fully customizable to meet the specific needs of your league.

![](https://www.flmsystem.com/api/media/file/Update.svg?2025-12-11T08%3A57%3A49.784Z)

### Real-Time Updates

Update match results, schedules, and team details in real-time, so referees, players, and fans are always informed. No more delays, miscommunication, or outdated information – it’s all live and in sync.

Features

## Comprehensivesolutionsforamateurandprofessionalfootballleagues.

![](https://www.flmsystem.com/api/media/file/Sports%20soccer-1.svg?2025-12-11T08%3A57%3A49.695Z)

### Organize Football Games

Streamline your football league management by assigning games to the appropriate league and season. Use the FLM system to add participating teams and manage football competitions efficiently.

![](https://www.flmsystem.com/api/media/file/1.png?2025-12-02T09%3A02%3A50.154Z)

![](https://www.flmsystem.com/api/media/file/Calendar%20clock.svg?2025-12-11T08%3A57%3A49.949Z)

### Schedule Football Matches

Organize your season’s fixtures manually or use the automated scheduling feature. The smart algorithm assigns teams and creates the match order efficiently. Save time and guarantee fair competition for all teams involved.

![Features](https://www.flmsystem.com/api/media/file/2.png?2025-12-12T09%3A58%3A45.001Z)

![](https://www.flmsystem.com/api/media/file/People%20alt.svg?2025-12-11T08%3A57%3A49.509Z)

### Collect and add football teams

The application allows league organizers to add soccer teams along with their players, completing such information as team name, city, team crest, main overview photo and team formation history.

![Test123](https://www.flmsystem.com/api/media/file/3.png?2025-12-11T12%3A25%3A11.108Z)

![](https://www.flmsystem.com/api/media/file/fi_8122958.svg?2025-12-11T08%3A57%3A50.111Z)

### Use Mobile App for Referees

Our mobile app empowers referees to quickly and intuitively record key match events such as assists, goals, corners, and yellow or red cards. Fully customizable to match league rules, it streamlines match oversight and ensures smooth game management.

![Referee app](https://www.flmsystem.com/api/media/file/4.png?2025-12-11T13%3A00%3A07.761Z)

![](https://www.flmsystem.com/api/media/file/Update.svg?2025-12-11T08%3A57%3A49.784Z)

### Get Seamless Results Updates

After the match, all results and events recorded through the mobile app are automatically transferred to the central league management system, ensuring real-time updates and streamlined operations.

![Matches](https://www.flmsystem.com/api/media/file/5.png?2025-12-11T13%3A15%3A02.698Z)

![](https://www.flmsystem.com/api/media/file/Query%20stats.svg?2025-12-11T08%3A57%3A49.588Z)

### Generate statistics

The football league management system allows you to customize the rules to your specific league, while generating clear statistics on the public page of the football league. Statistics are available in various places, such as the league card, team card and player card.

![Player](https://www.flmsystem.com/api/media/file/6.png?2025-12-12T13%3A01%3A48.503Z)

![](https://www.flmsystem.com/api/media/file/Analytics.svg?2025-12-11T08%3A57%3A49.866Z)

### Create Advanced League Tables

The FLM system lets you create detailed, easy-to-read league tables. Track match results, points, goal differences, and key stats, all updated automatically after each game. The intuitive public interface ensures quick access to essential data for better analysis and decision-making.

![Tables](https://www.flmsystem.com/api/media/file/7.png?2025-12-11T13%3A54%3A52.068Z)

Testimonials

It worked brilliantly from a coordination perspective, and the simplicity of handling match protocols (without using any paper!) made it much easier for us to organize everything.

## Registration for Youth Football, Flag Football, & More

Managing sign-ups shouldn’t be complicated, cumbersome, or hard to set up. TeamLinkt’s Football Registration Software makes it easy, even for the least tech-savvy users. Hundreds of leagues run registration for youth football, flag football, and touch football programs – registering thousands of players each season. TeamLinkt’s Football registration enables Football leagues to:

[Get Started Now](https://app.teamlinkt.com/users/create_account)

assignment

### Registration Forms

Create custom online registration forms for players, coaches, and volunteers.

attach\_money

### Payments

Collect secure payments (credit card, offline, or installments).

storefront

### Add-ons

Offer add-ons like merchandise, fundraising, insurance, and donations.

analytics

### Reporting

Track registration data in real time with easy reporting.

## Powerful Football Schedule Generator

Building fair, balanced schedules is one of the hardest jobs in football administration. Whether you’re generating a schedule for a few dozen games or an entire season, TeamLinkt saves hours of manual work.

![Football Schedule Generator Software Image](https://framerusercontent.com/images/0tTYHdcMwpApa7zWYLYAXHQimvo.png?width=1142&height=874)

### TeamLinkt’s [Football Schedule Generator](https://teamlinkt.com/sports/football/scheduling) makes it simple to:

Auto-generate complete league, division, or tournament schedules.

Handle blackout dates, home/away preferences, and field availability.

Sync schedules directly to your league website and mobile app.

Make updates in real time to instantly notify all teams.

EmpoweryourFootballprogramwithmoremeaningfulstatisticsandconnectleaguestakeholdersinreal-timetogameresults.

## Digital Scorekeeping, Stats & Communication

TeamLinkt helps football leagues move away from paper or traditional scorekeeping methods. With TeamLinkt’s digital gamesheets, your football league gains accuracy and speed.

[Get a Demo](https://teamlinkt.com/get-a-demo)

### [Digital Game Sheets & Scorekeeping](https://teamlinkt.com/sports/football\#section-1)

Every touchdown, extra point, penalties, and attendance directly from the field.

[Learn more](https://teamlinkt.com/sports/football/game-sheets)

### [Live Stats & Standings](https://teamlinkt.com/sports/football\#section-2)

### [Team App Features](https://teamlinkt.com/sports/football\#section-3)

### [Digital Signatures](https://teamlinkt.com/sports/football\#section-5)

![TeamLinkt's Football Scorekeeping](https://framerusercontent.com/images/eZfAXNylilbCow4toV4Wrg2dU.png?width=2048&height=1332)

![Digital Signatures on TeamLinkt](https://framerusercontent.com/images/nG5R06DJHG1ariwsP5EMxtkQETk.png?width=1704&height=1688)

## A Free Football Team App for Every Team in Your League

TeamLinkt isn’t just for administrators — it’s for every team in your league. By giving football teams their own app, your football league delivers a professional, modern league experience while reducing administrative workload on your end.

### Instant Schedule Sync

Every game, practice, and event flows automatically into the app.

![Image that showcases the scheduling feature of TeamLinkt's mobile app](https://framerusercontent.com/images/matSjuCGpZXKmRjIbG7an2A.png?width=1461&height=2167)

![Image that showcases the chat and messages feature of TeamLinkt's mobile app](https://framerusercontent.com/images/OiKmptMKSOkAiQvqJUeoAIQBqw8.png?width=1458&height=2166)

### Team Chat & Messaging

Keep communication organized and in one place.

### RSVPs & Attendance Tracking

Know exactly who’s in the lineup for every game.

![Image that showcases photos and videos the scheduling feature of TeamLinkt's mobile app](https://framerusercontent.com/images/CFgZmbWQL69MhEUpgn5Ow991Y.png?width=607&height=903)

### Photo & Video Sharing

Capture and share memories throughout the season.

![Image that showcases photos and videos the notifications feature of TeamLinkt's mobile app](https://framerusercontent.com/images/WSbE1MqOR2gsmpF0z5SLTYEQ.png?width=1458&height=2166)

### Push Notifications

Real-time updates on schedule changes, scores, and announcements.

## Launch Your Program's Site with TeamLinkt’s Football Website Builder

Give your league a professional online presence with TeamLinkt’s easy-to-use Football Website Builder. Create a modern website that showcases schedules, standings, rosters, and news, all updated automatically as you manage your league.

### With [TeamLinkt’s Football Website Builder](https://teamlinkt.com/sports/football/website-builder), your league can:

Customize your design with team logos, colours and branding.

Publish schedules & standings that update in real time.

Highlight news & announcements to keep families informed.

Add photos & media to showcase your season.

Integrate registration & payments directly into your site.

![Football Ontario Website Screenshots](https://framerusercontent.com/images/izc8W7CHTNhaDc12mVciIKyM1U.png?width=1024&height=771)

## Saskatoon Minor Football - Case Study

### About Saskatoon Minor Football

Saskatoon Minor Football (SMF) is one of the largest youth football organizations in Western Canada, offering programs for thousands of athletes each season. From tackle to flag football, SMF provides opportunities for players of all ages and skill levels, supported by hundreds of coaches and volunteers. In 2024, SMF had 6,300 different athletes participating across its program offerings.

### The Challenge

Before TeamLinkt, SMF’s administrators were spending significant time managing registration, rosters, and schedules across multiple programs. Communication with parents and players was spread across emails, phone calls, and other apps—making it difficult to keep everyone up to date. Paper-based scorekeeping and manual data entry also added extra work for staff and volunteers.

### Saskatoon Minor Football Joins TeamLinkt to Create a Better Experience

By adopting TeamLinkt’s Football League Management Software, SMF was able to:

Simplify registration and payments for thousands of players and families.

Automatically generate schedules across multiple divisions and fields.

Roll out the Team App for all teams to streamline communication, RSVPs, and notifications.

Use digital scorekeeping tools to track live scores and statistics.

“As an ever-growing organization, we were looking for \[software\] to provide the best experience to our community in terms of Football. Being able to partner with TeamLinkt at no cost helps us provide that enhanced value to our membership through team management, communication, registration, and scheduling with TeamLinkt.”

![Saskatoon Minor Football Logo](https://framerusercontent.com/images/nuApJ5RmAdE2mzbAazErVNn3je4.jpg?width=800&height=413)

Brian Guebert

Saskatoon Minor Football Administrator

### The Results

A modern registration process that’s faster and easier for families.

Reduced workload for administrators and volunteers.

A connected experience for players, parents, and coaches across all programs.

More accurate stats, standings, and game results, accessible in real time.
